title: Phase 17 – Checkpoint Store Concurrency Hardening
summary: Fix ENOENT/ENOTEMPTY failures in tests by making checkpoint writes resilient to concurrent directory deletion.

integration_points.reason: Single write can fail with ENOENT when .automation/checkpoints is concurrently removed by other tests. Add ENOENT retry after re-creating the directory.

observed_failures.error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '.automation/checkpoints/step-workflows/<id>.json'

observed_failures.impact: afterEach cleanup flakiness due to concurrent writes

approach: Wrap checkpoint write with try/catch, detect ENOENT, call ensureRoot()+retry once. No API or contract changes.
